indicators.name: large open space
indicators.rationale: The open space lacks a dedicated area for focused work, making it difficult to set up a workstation.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height to place a laptop or monitor.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no ergonomic seating available for prolonged use.

indicators.name: no task lighting
indicators.rationale: The lighting appears to be ambient and does not provide sufficient task illumination for screen work.

indicators.name: no dedicated low-distraction room layout
indicators.rationale: The layout is open and lacks a dedicated area for focused work, making it difficult to concentrate.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large open space and lack of dedicated work surfaces, ergonomic seating, and task lighting make it challenging to set up a productive workstation. The open layout also makes it difficult to concentrate on work tasks.
